metadataSource.releaseSelector: latest non-draft, non-prerelease release whose tag starts with cli-v

knownIssues: Live CLI smoke covers config, password login, sync, one synthetic login item create/update/trash/permanent-delete flow, and account revision lookup only.
The live smoke used a local compression-stripping HTTPS proxy because wrangler dev returned gzip chunked responses that the tracked CLI HTTP stack rejected.
TOTP login has local HTTP coverage only; no live client evidence is recorded yet.
Encrypted device key and bulk trust update have fixture coverage only; no live client evidence is recorded yet.
